name: Amazon Translate Translation Job
description: Schema representing an Amazon Translate batch translation job resource.

properties.name: JobId
properties.description: The ID of the translation job.

properties.name: JobName
properties.description: The user-provided name of the translation job.

properties.name: JobStatus
properties.description: The status of the translation job.

properties.name: SourceLanguageCode
properties.description: The language code of the source language.

properties.name: TargetLanguageCodes
properties.description: The language codes of the target languages.

properties.name: InputDataConfig
properties.description: The input data configuration for the translation job.

properties.name: OutputDataConfig
properties.description: The output data configuration for the translation job.

properties.name: DataAccessRoleArn
properties.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IAM role for S3 access.

properties.name: TerminologyNames
properties.description: The names of custom terminologies applied to the job.

properties.name: SubmittedTime
properties.description: The time the translation job was submitted.

properties.name: EndTime
properties.description: The time the translation job ended.

properties.name: Tags
properties.description: A list of tags associated with the translation job.
